message.content:
You are indexing Figma design pages exported as PNG tiles for a rewards program app (Sem Parar Mais - points, vouchers, cashback, marketplace).

Read each PNG file and describe what screen/component it shows. Be concise. Output format:
| PAGE_NUM | DESCRIPTION |

Only read CONTENT tiles (>10KB). Read these files:
